name: Hanasaku Iroha: Blossoms for Tomorrow
overview: Ohana is sent off to live with her grandmother, who owns the hot spring inn. Upon arriving, she is put to work at the inn. Thrust into a life where the customers always come first, she struggles to find her place and fit in with her fellow coworkers.

trailers.title: Hanasaku Iroha ~ Blossoms for Tomorrow ~ Vol 1 - Official Trailer
